title: Race against smoke & time: Inside the rescue op at Delhi hotel inferno that killed 21
content: A devastating fire at Malviya Nagar's Flourish Stay B&B claimed at least 21 lives and injured many.  Emergency services battled the blaze, rescuing 39 people.  The building's sealed design and single staircase exacerbated the tragedy, trapping occupants. Investigations into the cause and building compliance are underway, with authorities promising strict action.

title: Indian national killed in Iranian drone attack on Kuwait airport
content: An Indian national tragically died in an Iranian drone attack on Kuwait airport. The incident, which also caused significant damage to a passenger terminal, occurred amidst escalating regional tensions. The US military reported intercepting multiple drones targeting its forces in Kuwait and stated Iranian missiles fell apart en route.

title: Why TMC revolt is about Abhishek Banerjee, not Mamata
content: A Trinamool Congress rebellion is deepening, with expelled leader Ritabrata Banerjee challenging Abhishek Banerjee's authority rather than Mamata Banerjee's leadership. This internal strife, fueled by disputes over decision-making and the leader of opposition appointment, signals a proxy battle over succession, echoing past regional party struggles. The focus is on Abhishek's growing influence and organizational control.

title: 'Ek bihari, sab pe bhari': Sooryavanshi receives Virat Kohli's special praise
content: Following Royal Challengers Bengaluru's second consecutive IPL title win, Virat Kohli shared a special moment with teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi. Kohli, who was Player of the Match in the final, encouraged the young prodigy, who swept multiple season awards, to stay focused amidst his breakthrough campaign. Kohli's inspiring words and a memorable sign-off resonated with fans.

title: Google makes biggest-ever equity capital markets transaction of all time
content: Google is planning a historic $80 billion equity capital markets transaction to fund its significant investments in artificial intelligence infrastructure. This massive fundraising effort includes a $40 billion at-the-market offering and a $10 billion private placement with Berkshire Hathaway, aiming to bolster its AI capabilities amidst fierce industry competition.

title: ‘Imagine that pressure at 15’: Buttler on Vaibhav Sooryavanshi fever
content: Teenage sensation Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, just 15, has been hailed as the IPL 2026's true star, even surpassing RCB's title win.  Jos Buttler and Stuart Broad lauded his record-breaking 776 runs at a blistering strike rate.  His immense popularity in India and global recognition are unprecedented for a player yet to debut internationally.

title: Ukraine strikes St Petersburg oil terminal as Russia reports bus attack killing 8 civilians
content: Ukraine launched deep drone strikes on St. Petersburg's energy and military sites, including an oil terminal and naval base, just as Russia hosted its economic forum. This follows a deadly Russian barrage on Ukraine. Russia accused Ukraine of a separate bus strike killing eight. The escalating drone war sees both sides targeting infrastructure far from the front lines.

title: After 8,000 layoffs, Meta tells 7,000 employees: You can make the real impact on this team
content: Meta is making big changes. Thousands of employees are moving to new AI teams. This is part of a major company-wide AI focus. CEO Mark Zuckerberg wants to strengthen Meta's AI position. Some workers are calling it an 'AI draft'. The company is also developing new AI tools. This restructuring shows Meta's growing commitment to artificial intelligence.

title: SKY's successor needs unanimity, can Gambhir-Agarkar see eye-to-eye?
content: Suryakumar Yadav's poor form and wrist injury are making him a focus for selection committee ahead of India's T20I series vs Ireland and England. Discussions are expected regarding his captaincy and future T20I leadership. The selection panel, led by Ajit Agarkar, and coach Gautam Gambhir face the challenge of agreeing on a succession plan for the 2028 LA Games and T20 World Cup in the same year.

title: ‘Permanent class of excluded Indians’: Owaisi slams Centre over SIR
content: AIMIM chief Asaduddin Owaisi criticizes the Election Commission's voter list revision, fearing it could disenfranchise Muslims, women, migrants, and the poor, creating "excluded Indians." He alleges the exercise, which has already removed millions, is a precursor to identifying illegal immigrants. The Supreme Court, however, has upheld the EC's authority to ensure accurate electoral rolls.

title: US reaches EB-2 visa limit for Indians; new visas resume in October
content: Indian applicants for the EB-2 visa category will face a temporary halt as the US has exhausted its FY2026 quota. Embassies can no longer issue these visas until October 1, 2026, when the new fiscal year begins and limits reset. This impacts those seeking permanent residency through advanced degrees or exceptional abilities.

title: Over Rs 57L compensation for man left bedridden after accidents: Why Madras HC stepped in
content: The Madras High Court significantly increased motor accident compensation for a man left completely unresponsive after two road accidents, from Rs 33 lakh to over Rs 57 lakh. The court invoked suo motu powers, criticizing the victim's advocate for not seeking enhanced compensation. The victim suffered severe spinal injuries in a second accident while being transported after the first.

title: Cristiano Ronaldo’s ex-Portugal teammate reveals secret behind CR7’s success
content: Cristiano Ronaldo may no longer possess the explosive pace that made him one of football’s most feared wingers. However, his impact on the game remains as strong as ever. According to former Portugal teammate Ricardo, the veteran forward has successfully adapted his style over the years. As he continues to be a major threat in front of goal. As Portugal prepare for another FIFA World Cup campaign, Ronaldo’s experience and goalscoring ability remain crucial for the national team.

title: Aamir Khan set to marry Gauri Spratt in July in an intimate ceremony: Report
content: Aamir Khan and his partner Gauri Spratt are reportedly set to tie the knot on July 5, 2026. The couple, who have been living together for over a year, are planning a private, intimate ceremony at home with close family and friends.

title: Single entry-exit route: 21 killed after fire engulfs Delhi hotel; woman jumps from 3rd floor with kid
content: A devastating fire at a Malviya Nagar restaurant claimed 21 lives, with many victims being foreigners.  Rescue efforts saw dozens saved, but the blaze intensified rapidly.  Locals bravely attempted to help those trapped, using mattresses for escape.  Authorities are investigating the cause of the tragic incident.

title: Karnataka records sharpest fall in spousal violence: What data reveals
content: Karnataka has witnessed a dramatic 30-percentage-point drop in spousal violence, falling from 44.4% to 14.1% of ever-married women reporting abuse. This significant decline, nearly double that of the second-biggest mover, Assam, positions Karnataka in the middle of the national distribution. Experts attribute this improvement to multiple factors including reduced child marriages and increased women's empowerment.

title: Sat-Chi, fresh off Singapore Open win, pull out of Indonesia Open
content: India’s top men’s doubles pair, Satwiksairaj Rankireddy and Chirag Shetty, have withdrawn from the Indonesia Open 2026 after Satwik suffered an injury during their first-round match. The Badminton Association of India confirmed the duo will focus on recovery and rehabilitation. Their exit comes days after winning the Singapore Open title, ending a two-year wait for a BWF World Tour crown.

title: Turning tide on ‘fugitive plastic’: Why milk pouches are Delhi-NCR’s hidden pollution problem
content: Mother Dairy is launching India's first naturally degradable milk pouch. This new packaging will break down into natural elements in soil over a few years. It aims to tackle plastic waste that escapes recycling systems. The change will not affect consumers. This initiative addresses the significant plastic pollution from milk packaging in Delhi-NCR.

title: Trump’s 12.5% additional tariffs move under Section 301: What does it mean for India
content: The Section 301 probe launched by the US in March 2026 is a known variable in India’s trade deal talks with America. Yet, the proposal to impose duties on around 60 countries assumes significance at a time when a delegation from the US is in India to finalise terms of the India-US trade deal.

title: 'New generation of leaders': CJP appoints three spokespersons; first presser today
content: The Cockroach Janta Party (CJP), a unique political formation born from an internet sensation, has appointed Saurav Das, Vijeta Dahiya, and Ashutosh Ranka as its official spokespersons. This move signals the party's ambition to reshape India's political discourse with a new generation of leaders.

title: Rs 30k for 3rd kid, Rs 40k for 4th: When childbirth becomes number game, it is women who suffer
content: Andhra Pradesh's new cash incentives for more children signal a policy U-turn, aiming to counter falling fertility and an ageing population. However, critics argue this approach ignores the high costs of raising children, gender inequality, and the need for robust social support systems, potentially reinforcing patriarchal norms rather than addressing demographic concerns effectively.

title: Will or no Will: How to transfer property after the owner is dead
content: Grieving the loss of someone dear is a challenging journey, and dealing with property matters can feel overwhelming. Regardless of whether there's a will in place, it's essential to grasp the legal pathways, such as probate or acquiring a legal heir certificate. Ensuring government records are updated through mutation solidifies rightful ownership.

title: Last-ditch effort to avert split? TMC dissolves all key frontal wings amid revolt
content: ​In a significant political message, the letter submitted to the assembly speaker referred to Mamata Banerjee as the party's chairperson, suggesting that the rebel camp is positioning its challenge against the current leadership of the legislature party rather than against the TMC chief herself. Sources aligned with the dissident group told news agency PTI that the legislators have also rejected any role for Abhishek Banerjee in determining the affairs of the legislature party.

title: US-Iran war: Rs 10,000 crore ATF Price Stabilization Fund approved for OMCs
content: The Union Cabinet on Wednesday approved Aviation Turbine Fuel (ATF) Price Stabilisation Fund of Rs 10,000 crore which will be made available for domestic and international operations.

title: Cheaper gold by Rs 10 lakh - 15% import duty prompts smuggling wave in India
content: A recent surge in gold import duty has fueled a wave of smuggling, with illicit gold now available at discounts of up to Rs 10 lakh per kilogram. This creates a significant price disparity with legally imported bullion, mirroring trends seen after a similar duty hike in 2013.  Industry experts warn of escalating unofficial imports.

title: Drones hit Kuwait airport after Iran and US traded strikes; IndiGo issues advisory
content: In response to escalating regional tensions, IndiGo Airlines has suspended all its services to and from Kuwait, following a drone strike impacting the airport's passenger terminal. This closure of Kuwait's airspace has led to considerable disruptions for travelers.

title: Bonfim eyes UFC title picture: 'A win over Belal puts me in contention'
content: Gabriel Bonfim believes a win over former champion Belal Muhammad can establish him as a legitimate UFC welterweight contender. Riding a four-fight winning streak and coming off a statement knockout of Randy Brown, the Brazilian enters his second consecutive main event with growing confidence. Yet Muhammad's relentless pressure, wrestling and ability to thrive in long fights present a different challenge. For the former champion, it is a chance to halt a slide. For Bonfim, it is an opportunity to move closer to the title picture.

title: 'Ab sab chuk jayega': The IPL dream that will free Mukul Choudhary's family from debt
content: After a breakthrough IPL season with Lucknow Super Giants, Mukul Choudhary is set to fulfil a dream far bigger than cricket: helping his family clear a long-standing bank loan. From overnight bus journeys between Gurugram and Bharatpur to years of living in rented homes, the youngster's rise has been built on sacrifice, hard work and unwavering family support. Now, armed with lessons from Rishabh Pant, Mitchell Marsh and Nicholas Pooran, Mukul believes the IPL has changed his life and opened the road to bigger ambitions.

title: 21 dead after massive fire at hotel in Delhi's Malviya Nagar; several foreigners among victims
content: A devastating fire at a Malviya Nagar restaurant in South Delhi has claimed at least 20 lives, with many victims reportedly foreigners. Emergency services swiftly responded, rescuing 37 individuals who were hospitalized. Authorities are investigating the cause of the blaze, while the Delhi Chief Minister expressed deep sorrow and pledged government support.

title: India engaged with US over Section 301 probe linked to forced labour concerns
content: The Union government is engaging with the US concerning a Section 301 investigation into forced labor and industrial capacity. The US Trade Representative has identified India among countries with inadequate measures against goods made with forced labor, proposing potential tariffs. This occurs amidst ongoing bilateral trade deal discussions.

title: IND vs AFG: Siraj's availability hangs in the balance; Nabi on standby for one-off Test
content: Mohammed Siraj's availability for the Afghanistan Test remains uncertain, with selectors monitoring the pacer's workload after a long IPL season. Jammu & Kashmir seamer Auqib Nabi, one of the six net bowlers, is on standby and will join the squad if Siraj is rested. The one-off Test with Afghanistan gets underway on June 6.

title: TMC vs TMC: Major setback for Didi as rebels claim support of nearly 50 MLAs
content: On May 9, Trinamool Congress national general secretary Abhishek Banerjee wrote to the assembly speaker proposing senior party leader Sobhandeb Chattopadhyay's name as the leader of opposition. TMC MLAs Ritabrata Banerjee and Sandipan Saha, however, complained to the speaker alleging that "no resolution was adopted regarding the selection of the leader of opposition on May 6."

title: US proposes action against 60 countries over forced labour concerns: Why India is on the list
content: The US Trade Representative has proposed additional tariffs on goods from 54 economies, including India, over concerns about forced labor in supply chains. This move, stemming from a Section 301 investigation, could impact India's exports, particularly those relying on Chinese inputs, despite existing domestic prohibitions on forced labor.

title: 'Can't breathe': Video shows UK cops arresting stabbed teen as Indian-origin attacker posed as victim
content: A stabbing in Southampton led to a debate on religious symbols after a Sikh man fatally attacked a teenager, falsely claiming racial abuse. While the attacker was jailed for life, the incident sparked calls to restrict kirpans, prompting government assurances on religious freedom and condemnation of divisive rhetoric. Police actions at the scene are under investigation.

title: 'Selectors will do whatever is necessary': BCCI secretary on Sooryavanshi's India chances
content: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is making waves in cricket, following a stellar U-19 World Cup performance with a record-breaking IPL season. His exceptional batting has sparked widespread calls for his inclusion in the senior India squad, with selectors closely monitoring his progress for upcoming tours. BCCI secretary Devajit Saikia acknowledged his extraordinary rise, hinting at potential opportunities.

title: 'My son got kidnapped': Lalit Modi breaks silence on Dawood threats and IPL fixing allegations
content: Former IPL commissioner Lalit Modi, living in London since 2010, denies being a fugitive, stating no pending legal cases against him. He revisited allegations of threats from Dawood Ibrahim and associates after refusing to tolerate fixing during his IPL tenure, claiming his son was kidnapped and his life was targeted.

title: Why is stock market down? BSE Sensex, Nifty50 crash 1% — top reasons for fall
content: Both the Sensex and Nifty declined more than 1% as investor sentiment weakened amid growing concerns over the Iran-US conflict, continued foreign institutional investor (FII) outflows and a host of other market challenges.

title: FWICE withdraws non-cooperation directive against Ranveer Singh with immediate effect
content: FWICE has withdrawn its non-cooperation directive against Ranveer Singh with immediate effect, following intervention by IMPPA, Producers Guild, and CINTAA. The rollback came after Ranveer served a legal notice to the body. The controversy stemmed from his exit from Farhan Akhtar's Don 3 over creative differences and production delays.

title: 2 suitcases stashed with termite-eaten cash, firearm found in Kolkata college
content: Termite-damaged currency notes were discovered in two suitcases within a locked storeroom at Surendranath College during a dengue-prevention clean-up drive. Police also found a firearm in another locked union room. The discovery has sparked a political blame game, with allegations of corruption against a former Trinamool functionary.

title: Karnataka CM swearing-in LIVE: D.K. Shivakumar takes oath in the name of late seer Gangadhar Ajjayya
content: In stark contrast, senior Congress leader and fomer Home Minister Dr. G. Parameshwar took oath in the name of Dr. B.R. Ambedkar.

title: Ministers, ambassadors, artists to join The Hindu’s Huddle in June
content: This edition will discuss topics such as role of regional parties in strengthening India’s democracy, diplomacy in times of conflict, women’s representation in Parliament, and India and China’s role in shaping a new global order

title: Trinamool Congress announces organisational overhaul amid internal rebellion, dissolves all committees in Bengal
content: The decision comes hours after dissident TMC MLAs moved the Assembly Speaker seeking recognition as a separate legislature party, deepening the crisis within the organisation following its recent electoral setback

title: Principle, not politics: Pawan Kalyan on his backing for Telangana
content: In a post on X, Jana Sena chief Pawan Kalyan says his support for Telangana statehood sprang from conviction not politics, and traces it to his 2009 stand alongside Gaddar

title: Karnataka government formation: 13 Cabinet Ministers to be sworn-in, G. Parameshwara to be Deputy Chief Minister
content: Yathindra Siddaramaiah, son of outgoing Chief Minister Siddaramaiah will be making his debut in the Cabinet.

title: Rahul, Kharge pay tribute to Karunanidhi on birth anniversary amid Congress-DMK strain
content: Move being seen as attempts to assuage DMK leadership, which is reportedly upset over the Congress’ tie-up with actor-turned politician Vijay-led Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) and its reported bid to be a part of the Tamil Nadu government.

title: Currency notes worth more than one lakh damaged by termites found in Kolkata college union room
content: The civic authorities had recently advised educational institutions to clean their premises before the onset of the rainy season. During the exercise, workers entered the college union room and found two old suitcases

title: CBSE says 40,000 students have completed re-evaluation process via portal without issues so far
content: Candidates may use online payment options including UPI, net banking, credit card and debit card through the designated gateways, it said

title: U.S. proposes 12.5% tariff on India and other countries, Indian govt says it ‘remains engaged’ with U.S.
content: The action follows investigations launched against 60 countries over what the USTR described as their failure to impose and effectively enforce bans on imports made with forced labour

title: Trinamool rift deepens; 20 MLAs attend administrative meeting called by Bengal CM Suvendu Adhikari
content: Trinamool MLAs present included prominent names such as Firhad Hakim, Javed Khan and Kunal Ghosh; the development comes amid reports that several rebel MLAs have submitted a claim to elect a new Leader of Opposition

title: Annamalai quits BJP, to start new political ‘movement’
content: Sources told The Hindu on Wednesday that Mr. Annamalai submitted his resignation letter to the party leadership on Tuesday

title: Cabinet approves construction of new coastal Rameshwar-Paradeep highway in Odisha
content: The project section of the new coastal highway passes through Khurda, Puri, Kendrapada and Jagatsinghpur districts of Odisha

title: Anantapur police launch AI voice-complaint system ‘AI Prajavani’
content: Anantapur SP P. Jagadeesh launches ‘AI Prajavani’, a system that turns a spoken grievance into a printed complaint, at the weekly grievance day

title: TheraNyM Biologics opens ₹1,200 crore manufacturing facility near Hyderabad
content: Telangana Industries Minister D. Sridhar Babu inaugurates the new facility of the Aurobindo Pharma subsidiary that is expected to generate job opportunities for more than 1,500 local youth

title: Siddaramaiah’s imprint on first batch of ministers sworn in with D.K. Shivakumar
content: Senior legislators and loyalists of former Chief Minister find place in 14-member Cabinet headed by D.K. Shivakumar

title: Bengal government hands over 31 acres to BSF for fencing at India-Bangladesh border
content: The issue of land transfer for border fencing had remained contentious in the State, with the Calcutta High Court earlier criticising the previous State government for delays in handing over land to the BSF for securing the international border

title: 10-year-old Kerala girl with Down syndrome breaks barriers in music
content: She secures entries in International Book of World Records, India Book of Records, Worldwide Book of Records, Universal Record Book and Nobel World Records for performing the National Anthem on the keyboard in 1 minute and 25 seconds

title: Kerala HC grants transit bail to actor-husband of viral Kumbh Mela woman in kidnapping case
content: This will allow the couple to approach the Madhya Pradesh High Court since the FIR is registered in that State

title: Radio-tagged white-rumped vulture captured near Mudumalai Tiger Reserve
content: Speaking to The Hindu, R. Vidhyadhar, Deputy Director of MTR (Buffer Zone), said that the bird had been moving around different habitats over the past few weeks, including Gudalur, but not feeding on carcasses with other vultures

title: Delhi Malviya Nagar hotel fire: Police file culpable homicide FIR
content: “According to police sources, the hotel has only one entry-exit. The fire NOC is under scanner,” officials said

title: Abhishek moves Calcutta HC, seeks protection against CID action in signature forgery case
content: The controversy triggers rift in Trinamool with rumours of split in the party; reports suggest that around 50 MLAs had a meeting with leader Ritabrata Banerjee and may together leave the party

title: ‘Insult to SC’: Congress on Arunachal Pradesh CM having ‘control’ over files amid CBI probe
content: Congress leader Jairam Ramesh alleged that all principles and norms have been abandoned by the BJP in the case of Arunachal Pradesh CM Pema Khandu, and that this was an ‘insult’ to the Supreme Court

title: ‘Khan Sir’ coaching institute in Patna vandalised, pelted with stones; 3 arrested
content: Faisal Khan also claimed that firing took place at the institution. The police, however, denied the claim

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay pays tribute to Karunanidhi on his birth anniversary
content: Minister Rajmohan paid tributes to Karunanidhi’s portrait on the Omandurar Government Estate premises

title: MMA champion visits alma mater in Shivamogga, speaks to students
content: Kantharaj Agasa became an MMA fighter in 2014, and competed at the Las Vegas World Championship in 2015

title: India, U.S. probe forced labour, excess industrial capacity concerns
content: The USTR had issued its findings in the forced labour investigation and proposed additional tariffs on imports from 60 economies, with a 12.5% import tariff for India

title: Kerala mulls boosting stroke treatment network via hub-and-spoke model
content: Replying to a calling attention motion, Health Minister says post-COVID stroke cases are generally on the rise in the State. But more clinical studies are required to establish the reasons behind this

title: Three of inter-State theft gang held near Dhone; Nandyal ₹14 lakh and car seized
content: The Dhone and Nandyal police arrest three members of a Rajasthan-based inter-State theft gang and seize ₹14 lakh, a car and illicit liquor; a fourth accused is absconding

title: ‘Unrecognisable, everyone severely burnt’: Relatives rush to hospital after Delhi fire
content: The hospital's waiting area was filled with people scanning lists, making frantic phone calls and seeking information from officials as victims of the blaze were brought in

title: Parliamentary exchange programmes aid India-Norway bilateral relations: Sribharat
content: Visakhapatnam MP M. Sribharat, part of an Indian parliamentary delegation in Oslo, meets former Norwegian Prime Minister Erna Solberg and visits the Storting on the India-Norway exchange tour

title: K.T. Jaleel, wife join CPI(M), calls it ‘stand against communal forces’
content: Jaleel says he will remain ‘grateful’ to CPI(M) for making him MLA for four terms and a Minister for five years ‘without begging anyone or seeking recommendations’

title: Zyoin Group & KDEM sign MoU to accelerate GCC growth in Karnataka
content: The two organisations will work together to support companies across various stages of their GCC lifecycle, including market entry, operational setup, and scale-up

title: J&K CM Omar takes his legislators to off-limit forest destination in Srinagar to dissect 19 months of NC rule
content: There is pressure from NC legislators to expand the ministerial berths, because three ministerial seats remain vacant in J&K since Mr. Abdullah took over as Chief Minister in October 2024

title: Aadhav Arjuna calls on Union Minister Mansukh Mandaviya, pitches T.N. as host for 2029 National Games
content: Minister Aadhav Arjuna also sought the Centre’s support for comprehensive sports development across the State

title: Maharashtra Council polls: Mahayuti urges rebel candidates to withdraw from race
content: The Opposition Maha Vikas Aghadi parties, on the other hand, are grappling with withdrawals and disqualification of their official nominees

title: As screens shrink, Tamil entertainment finds new ways to tell stories
content: KadhaiShorts, a micro drama platform launched recently, aims to bring vertical story telling packaged into snackable two-minute episodic content to the Tamil audience across the world

title: NEET, CBSE exam crisis: Kerala has written to Centre, says Education Minister Samsudheen
content: Speaking on behalf of Higher Education Minister Roji M. John in Assembly, Minister says any legal help sought by students will be provided by the government

title: Who was Sathyendra? The Chennai cinephile who always had questions
content: The cinephile, whose viral Leo review made headlines, passed away recently. Chennai’s film community rose up to the occasion

title: Sri Lankan Tamil girl killed after gang rams SUV into two-wheeler on Chennai’s Koyambedu flyover
content: A six-member gang first picked a fight with her and then assaulted her before driving the SUV into her two-wheeler, say the police

title: Semiconductor training fabrication facility at IISc Bengaluru inaugurated by President Droupadi Murmu
content: The Semiconductor Training Fab has been created to provide hands-on, industry-relevant training in semiconductor fabrication, microfabrication processes, cleanroom operations, device manufacturing, and characterisation techniques

title: Kerala Assembly: LDF accuses UDF of unfair mass transfers of government staff, stages walkout
content: Opposition Leader Pinarayi Vijayan says government transferred around 2,000 employees in violation of transfer rules. UDF refutes charges

title: Tata taps China's Chery for premium EV push
content: Tata will use Chery’s platform to locally build EVs under its premium Avinya brand with plans for at ‌least two cars, the first of which will be launched in 2027

title: Annapurna Yojana: Women beneficiaries to receive ₹3,000 in West Bengal’s new cash assistance scheme
content: Under the Annapura Yojana scheme, women will receive ₹3,000 per month. The existing Lakshmir Bhandar scheme will continue until the new programme is fully implemented

title: Maharashtra government acquires Mumbai’s iconic Air India building in ₹1,601 crore deal
content: The Air India building, a 23-storey sea-facing commercial tower at Nariman Point in south Mumbai built in 1974 on State government-owned reclaimed land, has long been one of the city’s landmarks

title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay fails to uphold constitutional morality: DMK MP A. Raja
content: The DMK could wait six months before offering a broader assessment of Vijay’s government, but that did not mean it would refrain from commenting on day-to-day governance, says party deputy general secretary

title: ‘Expect a flamboyant governance style from D.K. Shivakumar’
content: Senior political journalist Rasheed Kidwai talks about his book on D. K. Shivakumar, and why he considers the new CM an astute regional strongman with national appeal

title: Ramakrishna Raju condemns ‘cut out tongue’ threat against Pawan Kalyan
content: AP Deputy Speaker K. Raghu Ramakrishna Raju condemns a threat by some Telangana leaders against Pawan Kalyan and says a democracy has no place for threatening politics

title: Jairam Ramesh presses Centre over Great Nicobar clearances
content: Jairam Ramesh and Environment Minister Bhupender Yadav have exchanged several letters over the issue, with the former slamming the government over the project and claiming it would cause great ecological damage

title: U.T. Khader quits as Assembly Speaker, set to become Minister in new Karnataka Cabinet
content: Khader, the MLA representing the Mangaluru constituency, submitted his resignation to Deputy Speaker Rudrappa Lamani

title: Fire accidents since Independence – A timeline
content: From The Hindu’s archives, a look at some of major fire accidents across the country since Independence

title: It is not just songs, Ilaiyaraaja is also integral to ‘Manjanathi’: Mari Selvaraj
content: “Whenever the name Manjanathi came to my mind, I thought of adapting it into a film. Even then, I had decided that maestro Ilaiyaraaja should compose the music. When I met him and narrated the story, he agreed to score it,” the director said.

title: Kerala HC extends stay on arrest of viral Kumbh Mela woman’s husband Farmaan Khan
content: An FIR was registered against Farmaan Khan, and a probe was launched by the National Commission for Scheduled Tribe after the woman’s father claimed that she was minor

title: Madras High Court allows Bangladeshi woman to donate kidney to her son
content: Justice G.R. Swaminathan criticises the authorisation committee in Chennai for denying permission for the renal transplantation on “irrelevant” grounds

title: US-Iran Live Updates: Iran Strikes Kuwait Airport, Several Injured, Fights Suspended
content: US-Iran War Live: Iran fired missiles at Kuwait and Bahrain hours after US conducted strikes on Iran's Qeshm Island amid ongoing peace talks between Washington and Tehran.

title: Cabinet Okays Rs 9,585 Crore Scheme To Replace Old Trucks, Buses In Delhi-NCR
content: The scheme will benefit approximately 2.07 lakh (1.91 lakh trucks and 16,329 buses) vehicle owners in Delhi-NCR (comprising Delhi, Haryana, Rajasthan, and Uttar Pradesh), the statement said.

title: Opinion: DK Shivakumar Comes With Mastery Of Delhi Networks And Karnataka Grassroots
content: It will be a true test for DK Shivakumar, the eight-time MLA and strongman from Kanakapura, as he navigates an out-of-power Siddaramaiah and manages Karnataka's delicate socio-political equations

title: Exit Route Or Reconciliation? Inside K Annamalai's Meeting With BJP's Top Leadership
content: The BJP leadership is learnt to have assured K Annamalai of support for his proposed statewide public outreach programme, a campaign he believes could help strengthen the party's grassroots presence.

title: Opinion: Opinion | The China Shock 2.0 May Already Be Here
content: According to the IMF, China's total non-financial sector debt has climbed to roughly 313% of GDP and is projected to reach 323% by 2026.

title: Stock Market Highlights, Sensex Today: Sensex Closes 300 Points Lower Amid Mixed Global Cues
content: Stock Market, Sensex, Share Market, Nifty LIVE Updates: US mulls ending Russian oil sanctions waiver. Decision to benefit India.

title: Delhi Hotel Fire Updates: 21 Killed In Delhi Hotel Fire, PM Modi Announces Rs 2 Lakh Compensation
content: Delhi's Malviya Nagar Hotel Fire Updates: More than 40 persons have been rescued and shifted to nearby hospitals for medical treatment.

title: Foreigners Killed In Delhi Hotel Fire Were Staying For Medical Treatment
content: The hotel, located in the narrow streets of the Hauz Rani area, is close to one of Delhi's top medical centres, Max Super Speciality Hospital.

title: 'Just For Clicks': Indian Americans Dismiss Frisco's Anti-India Propaganda
content: The 22-year-olds, Neha Suratani and Sahaas Kaul, have dismissed invasion claims, saying they are not based on facts and that anti-Indians are doing it for social media.

title: "We Can't Recognise Them": Families Search For Loved Ones After Delhi Fire
content: Among them was Namit Goel, who said six of his relatives were among those caught in the fire. While four bodies had been identified, two were yet to be identified, leaving the family in agonising uncertainty.

title: Khamenei Adviser Vows 'Deluge Of Missiles' If New US Attack On Iran
content: The warning followed US strikes on an Iranian tanker and on Iran's Qeshm island, sparking retaliatory attacks on Kuwait and Bahrain.

title: What's Delaying Monsoon? Scientists Point To Indian Ocean, El Nino
